query: I was sorting through some cleaning supplies earlier and it felt a bit stuffy in the utility room how is the air quality in there right now

steps.thought: The user wants to know the air quality in the utility room. I will retrieve the environmental states of the utility room, which includes PM10 levels, to assess the air quality.

I have retrieved the environmental states for the utility room. The PM10 level is 42.59 μg/m³, which indicates the air quality. The temperature is 28.32°C and humidity is 63.40%, which contributes to the stuffy feeling. I will now provide this information to the user.

action_input.answer: The air quality in the utility room is currently at a PM10 level of 42.59 μg/m³. The temperature is 28.32°C and the humidity is 63.40%, which might explain why it feels stuffy.
